---
title: "SDTM Workshop using {sdtm.oak}"
author: "Rammprasad Ganapathy (Roche/Genentech)"
format:
  html:
    theme: cosmo
    toc: false
    css: styles.css
---

::: {.hero-banner}
# Welcome to the SDTM Workshop

Learn to create SDTM datasets using the `{sdtm.oak}` package
:::

## Choose Your Workshop Version

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
::: {.callout-note icon=false}
## 📊 Full Workshop

**Duration:** 2+ hours

Complete workshop with all domains, detailed explanations, and exercises.

*Last updated: November 2025*

**Includes:**

- Introduction to sdtm.oak
- CM (Concomitant Medications) domain
- VS (Vital Signs) domain
- DM (Demographics) domain
- AE (Adverse Events) domain
- Hands-on exercises

[Start Full Workshop →](full.html){.btn .btn-primary}
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
::: {.callout-tip icon=false}
## ⚡ Condensed Version

**Duration:** ~30 minutes

Streamlined version focusing on core concepts and code generation demo.

*Last updated: March 2026*

**Includes:**

- Quick intro to sdtm.oak
- Code generation demo using Claude AI (to be released soon)
- VS domain walkthrough
- Key concepts and takeaways

[Start Condensed Version →](condensed.html){.btn .btn-success}
:::
:::

:::

---

## Resources

:::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="50%"}
### Documentation
- [sdtm.oak Package](https://pharmaverse.github.io/sdtm.oak/)
- [Pharmaverse Examples](https://pharmaverse.github.io/examples/)
- [CDISC COSA](https://www.cdisc.org/cosa)
:::

::: {.column width="50%"}
### Code & Materials
- [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/pharmaverse/rinpharma-SDTM-workshop)
- [YouTube Tutorial](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=H0FdhG9_ttU)
- [Blog Post](https://pharmaverse.github.io/blog/posts/2024-10-24_introducing.../introducing_sdtm.oak.html)
:::

::::

---

::: {.callout-important}
## Get Involved

Try the package and provide feedback! Reach us at:

- **Slack:** [oakgarden.slack.com](https://oakgarden.slack.com)
- **GitHub:** [github.com/pharmaverse/sdtm.oak](https://github.com/pharmaverse/sdtm.oak)
- **CDISC Wiki:** [wiki.cdisc.org/display/oakgarden](https://wiki.cdisc.org/display/oakgarden)
:::

---
